subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God! The pearls within the shells of the Ocean of divine grace are at all times manifest and resplendent [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله لئالئ اصداف عمانى فضل الهى در هر حین ظاهر و مشهور
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @suffering and imprisonment, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people
